raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis irr tas Pazelscha-
as-Uppuris/ ko jums buhs pa-
elt/ to festu Teeſu weenas Ee-
as no weena Omersa Kweeschu/
ums arrt buhs doht to festu Tee-
i weenas Eepas no weena Ome-
a Meeschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un par to Etji irr Schis
as Likkums / (jo weens Bats
er tahs Etjes Mehre/) jums
uhs uppureht to defmitu Teeſu
veena Batta no weena Korus/
as irr weens Omers no defmits
Batteem/ jo defnuts Batti irr
weenas Omers.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atkah weenu Jehru no
a gannama Puſka no divi-
mtes/ no taukas Gannibas I-
aëta/ par Ehdamo-Uppuri un
Dedsamo-Uppuri / un Pateik-
hanas-Uppureem/ Salihdsina-
hanu pahr teem darriht/fakka
as Kungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiffeem Laudim eekſch
Semmes nahkſees scho Pazel-
hanas-Uppurt doht/ tas buhs
reekſch ta Waldneeka eekſch I-
aëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Waldneekam pee-
ahks uppureht Dedsamo-Up-
rus/ un Ehdamo-Uppuri / un
Dedsamo-Uppuri Swehtkus /
n jaunds Mehneſchos/ un
wehdeenäs / wiﬀos eezeltös
igſtos Laikos ta Israëta Nam-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Pirmā Mehnefi pir-
ma Deena tahs Mehnes / buhs
tew weenu jaunu Wehrſi/ kas
bes Wainas/ nemt/ un to tweh-
tu Weetu falihdsinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs
no ta Grehko-Uppura Afins
nemt/ un pee ta Namma Sten-
dereem/ un pee teem tschetreem
Stuhreem ta Altara apkahrte-
jahm Liſtehm likt/ un pee ta
eekſcheja Bagalmja Wahrtu
Stendereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapatt buhs tew dar-
riht feptita Deena tahs Meh-
nes preekſch jebkurra / kas ir no-
maldijecs jeb peewilts tappis/ ta
buhs jums to Nammu falihdsi-
naht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pirma Mehnefi zettortā-
padefinitā Deena tahs Meh-
nes/ buhs jums tohs Paffa-
Swehtkus turreht / feptinas
Deenas fwahthht/ un neraudse-
tas Maises ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam Waldneekam
buhs tai Deena preekſch fewim/
an wiffeem Laudim tahs Sein-
mes weenu Wehrſi fataisfht par
Grehko-Uppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tannis feptinas
Swehttu Deenas/ buhs win-
xam par Dedsamo-Uppuri tam
KUN-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
